subject: Fix Hostinger env build failure
description: Diagnose issues.md Hostinger npm install/build failure after production env changes, implement minimal config fix, verify local build/env checks.

hypotheses: NODE_ENV=production or npm production mode omits devDependencies so tsc/vite/prisma/tsx missing during build
Hostinger partial cache caused esbuild binary mismatch
Workspace lock/root install mismatch prevents frontend devDependency bin linking
metadata.rootCause: Hostinger deploy env/cached install: stale nested tsx/esbuild caused binary mismatch; NODE_ENV=production caused devDependencies to be omitted so tsc/vite/prisma were unavailable.
resolution: Add .npmrc include=dev and legacy-peer-deps for Hostinger npm install
Add preinstall cleanup for stale nested tsx esbuild directories
Wrap root build with ensure-build-deps guard that reinstalls build tools if Hostinger still omits them
Keep old app build chain as build:app
verification: Hostinger logs pulled: latest failed deployment used correct app_type=other/output=dist/entry_file=backend/dist/index.js and failed exactly as issues.md described
Clean temp NODE_ENV=production npm ci installed 619 packages and produced tsc/vite/prisma shims
clean-stale-esbuild fixture passed when run from deploy root
full local npm run build reached backend prisma generate then hit known Windows EPERM DLL lock, unrelated to Hostinger Linux deploy
